title: COST_REPORT payload
description: Reports the actual token/wall-clock cost of handling a coordination signal. Routed to the coordinator. Drives adaptive routing thresholds and developer-facing cost dashboards.

signal_id.description: The msg_id of the signal whose handling this reports on.

tokens_billed.description: Tokens billed by the inference backend for handling this signal. For hosted backends, includes both cached and non-cached portions.

tokens_cached.description: Optional. Of tokens_billed, how many hit the prompt cache (charged at reduced rate).

wall_clock_ms.description: End-to-end time from signal arrival to handling complete.

estimated_usd.description: Optional. Estimated dollar cost based on current pricing. Calculated by the SDK.
